message:
fix: correct tmux passthrough comment and tru binary name in test comment

- tmux.conf: comment said "bracketed paste" but setting is allow-passthrough
- test_new_tools_e2e.sh: header listed "toon" but binary name is "tru"

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -13,7 +13,7 @@ set -g mouse on
 # that screen-256color lacks (see tmux FAQ and terminfo docs)
 set -g default-terminal "tmux-256color"
 set -ga terminal-overrides ",*256col*:Tc"
-# Enable bracketed paste mode (prevents accidental command execution when pasting URLs/text)
+# Allow passthrough sequences (kitty graphics, sixel, etc.) and cursor shape overrides
 set -g allow-passthrough on
 set -ga terminal-overrides ",*:Ss=\\E[%p1%d q:Se=\\E[2 q"

@@ -3,7 +3,7 @@
 #
 # Tests:
 #   - 7 First-class flywheel tools: br, ms, rch, wa, brenner, dcg, ru
-#   - 9 Utility tools: toon, rust_proxy, rano, xf, mdwb, pt, aadc, s2p, caut
+#   - 9 Utility tools: tru, rust_proxy, rano, xf, mdwb, pt, aadc, s2p, caut
 #   - Integration: acfs doctor, flywheel.ts, br primary command
 #
 # Related: bead bd-1ega.7
